Beta 2 Microglobulin (B2M) Tumor Marker Test

Beta 2 Microglobulin (B2M) Tumor Marker Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a beta-2 microglobulin tumor marker test? 
A beta-2 microglobulin tumor marker test Â measures the amount of a protein called beta-2 microglobulin (B2M) in your body fluids. The test usually uses a sample of your blood. It may also be done using urine (pee) or in rare c
